_note: PLACEHOLDER approaches — the angles the engine fans proposals across. The judge never sees which approach produced which proposal (sealed per-round mapping). The Pilot's repeated selections among these are the learning signal (ADR-0015).

approaches.title: Economy — fewest elements that still land
approaches.hint: Cut everything optional. Prefer one strong element over three good ones; hold stillness before movement; let a single detail carry the moment.

approaches.title: Homage — classic genre grammar
approaches.hint: Lean on the genre's proven grammar: dramatic angles, speed lines, held impact frames, high-contrast lighting. Familiar shapes, executed cleanly.

approaches.title: Physicality — weight and consequence
approaches.hint: Ground everything in weight: feet plant, cloth drags, breath shows. Impacts displace things. Sound arrives a hair after the image.
